# VouchTrack

> Done-for-you Google review and reputation management for single-location US local businesses (hair salons, nail salons, auto repair, dental, restaurants, HVAC & home services). Automatic review requests by text, email, and QR code; every review answered — drafted by AI, approved by a human; one inbox for 85+ review sites; monthly report card. Published pricing ($199–$299/month), no contracts, 30-day money-back guarantee.

## Key pages
- [How it works](https://www.vouchtrack.com/how-it-works): setup, timeline, what owners actually do
- [Features](https://www.vouchtrack.com/features): review requests, AI replies, one inbox, widgets, video testimonials, ranking maps, AI search visibility
- [Pricing](https://www.vouchtrack.com/pricing): plans, message allowances, annual discount, guarantee
- [FAQ](https://www.vouchtrack.com/faq): setup, negative reviews, Yelp policy, review-request legality
- [Industries](https://www.vouchtrack.com/industries): salons, auto repair, dental, restaurants, HVAC
- [Review ROI calculator](https://www.vouchtrack.com/tools/review-calculator): transparent math on ratings and revenue
- [Reviews needed calculator](https://www.vouchtrack.com/tools/reviews-needed-calculator): how many reviews to reach a target rating
- [Free tools hub](https://www.vouchtrack.com/tools): all free tools, no signup
- [Review request templates](https://www.vouchtrack.com/tools/review-request-templates): text and email request messages by industry
- [Review QR poster maker](https://www.vouchtrack.com/tools/review-qr-poster): printable counter card with QR code
- [Review policy checkup](https://www.vouchtrack.com/tools/review-policy-quiz): quiz against Google policies and the FTC reviews rule
- [Blog](https://www.vouchtrack.com/blog)
- [About](https://www.vouchtrack.com/about)
